title: Dress Live — CatVTON Virtual Try-On
description: Photoreal garment-on-person diffusion try-on for live boutique video calls. Wraps CatVTON (~899M params) on a CUDA 12.1 image with the model attention weights baked in for fast cold starts. Inputs are a customer photo + dress image; output is a JPEG composite in ~1.5–3s per call on RTX 4090. Note: CatVTON is CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 — contact the authors for commercial use.

input.name: Base SD-inpainting model
input.description: HuggingFace repo ID or local path of the Stable Diffusion inpainting checkpoint CatVTON wraps. Default downloads ~5GB on first request and caches on the worker disk.

input.name: Mixed precision
input.description: Inference precision. bf16 = recommended for Ada/Hopper (RTX 4090, L40S, H100). fp16 = older Ampere cards. no = full fp32, slower.
